title: BDRY - January 17, 2023
summary: Higher lows/higher highs could be on the cards for this year - As dry bulk activity resumes following the Christmas Early Chinese New Year and relaxed Covid controls to shape the near-term direction of economic activity - The Dry bulk focus shifts back to fundamentals - Following a period of high uncertainty and significant disruptions
